# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '16'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Execute custom build script
      run: |
        # Custom build command provided by developer
        ./custom-build-script.sh

    - name: Run deployment commands
      run: |
        # Deployment command provided by developer
        ./deploy.sh
